pageContext.name: Guiding Light
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Guiding Light Fine Art Print, an original fantasy art print by artist Adrianna Vanderstelt.  Adrianna Vanderstelt is best recognized for her fantastical illustrations that reveal hidden realms filled with floral beauty, mythical mermaids, and imagination brought to life. In Guiding Light, the morning mists dissolve as the sun rises over a lush green meadow filled with blossoms. Perched on a mossy rock, an adorable baby dragon is entranced by a luminescent butterfly. The two winged friends regard one another with awe and curiosity as the sky brightens at the dawn of a new adventure.  Each Guiding Light Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Adrianna Vanderstelt as a part of this release through Sideshow. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this enchanting dragon artwork is a must-have for any fantasy enthusiast's wall.  Spread your wings and take flight with the Guiding Light Fine Art Print by Adrianna Vanderstelt.
